query: As of July 2026, what is the financial/bankruptcy status of Beyond Meat Inc? Has it filed for Chapter 11 or restructured debt? Any bankruptcy warnings, going concern doubts, debt restructuring, or imminent bankruptcy risk in 2025-2026?
answer:
## Summary: Beyond Meat (BYND) Financial/Bankruptcy Status as of July 2026

**Bottom line: Beyond Meat has NOT filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy** and stated it has no plans to file. However, it faced acute insolvency risk in 2025 and executed a major **out-of-court debt restructuring** (completed Oct 30, 2025) — formally accounted for as a **"troubled debt restructuring" (TDR)** — to avoid default on its 2027 debt wall.

### Key findings

**The debt restructuring (the central event):**
- Swapped ~$1.15B of 0% Convertible Notes due 2027 for new **7.00% Convertible Notes due 2030** plus stock
- **97.44% of noteholders** participated; issued ~$209.7M of 2030 Notes + **317.8M new shares**; only $29.5M of 2027 Notes remain
- Extended maturity 2027→2030, but raised interest cost from 0%→7%
- **Extreme dilution:** shares went from ~76M (Q3 2025) → ~455M (Q1 2026) → ~515M by May 2026

**Current condition (Q1 2026, ended March 28, 2026):**
- Cash (incl. restricted): **$205.8M**; total debt carrying value **$411.6M**; stockholders' **deficit**
- Revenue **$58.2M, down 15.3% YoY** (declining across all segments)
- Operating loss $41.1M; net loss $28.5M — but cash burn fell to just $5.0M (lowest in 2+ years)
- Note: FY2025 Q4's reported +$370.9M net income was a **non-cash accounting gain** (~$523M debt extinguishment), not operating profit

**Distress signals still active:**
- Analysts/Creditsafe flagged Chapter 11 risk and going-concern doubt in 2025
- **Nasdaq delisting deadline of Aug 31, 2026** (stock below $1); reverse split under consideration
- Stock ~$0.67, down ~91% from 52-week high, >99% from IPO highs; market cap ~$348M
- Delayed FY2025 10-K + disclosed **material weakness** in internal controls
- Multiple securities class actions + co-manufacturer arbitration

**Trajectory:** The company avoided bankruptcy by trading near-term insolvency risk for runway to 2030, at the cost of massive dilution and higher interest. It remains highly distressed but is currently solvent, with improving cash burn as the sole positive operating signal.

Full findings with all data points and sources have been recorded in the structured output.

sources.title: Analyst: Beyond Meat faces Chapter 11 bankruptcy as cash dwindles
sources.snippet: Beyond Meat in survival mode with going-concern risk; ~$1.2B debt and cash reserves ~$117M; working with advisors on restructuring.

sources.title: Beyond Meat headed to Chapter 11 bankruptcy
sources.snippet: Coverage of Beyond Meat's debt swap and bankruptcy-risk narrative; company said it has not filed and does not plan to file for bankruptcy.

sources.title: Beyond Meat Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
sources.snippet: Net revenues $58.2M (down 15.3% YoY); cash incl. restricted $205.8M; total debt carrying value $411.6M as of March 28, 2026.

sources.title: Beyond Meat Q1 2026 Press Release (Form 8-K Exhibit 99.1)
sources.snippet: Balance sheet: total current liabilities $109.0M, total long-term liabilities $491.5M; $62.6M of 2030 Notes converted post-quarter into 52.1M shares.

sources.title: Beyond Meat Quarterly Report for Quarter Ending March 28, 2026 (Form 10-Q)
sources.snippet: Exchange Offer completed Oct 30, 2025; issued $209.7M 2030 Notes and 317,834,446 New Shares; 97.44% of 2027 Notes tendered; $29.459M 2027 Notes remain; accounted for as troubled debt restructuring.

sources.title: Beyond Meat Launches Exchange Offer and Consent Solicitation Intended to Eliminate Over $800 Million of Debt
sources.snippet: Sept 29, 2025 announcement of exchange offer to swap 2027 Notes for 2030 Notes and common stock.

sources.title: Beyond Meat (BYND) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
sources.snippet: Debt $411.6M outstanding after exchange; $62.6M notes converted to 52.1M shares post-quarter; cash $205.8M; lowest quarterly cash consumption in over 2 years.

sources.title: Beyond Meat Draws Retail Buzz Amidst Broad Shuffle, Debt Restructuring
sources.snippet: 97% bondholders agreed to swap 2027 debt for $202.5M debt maturing 2030; already facing bankruptcy risk.

sources.title: Beyond Meat faces delisting as it flips the brand
sources.snippet: Nasdaq delisting warning after 30 straight days below $1; deadline Aug 31, 2026; rebranded as 'Beyond The Plant Protein Co.'; class action over asset valuations.

sources.title: Beyond Meat delays 2025 10-K, flags control weakness
sources.snippet: Delayed FY2025 10-K to review inventory; expects to report material weakness in internal control over financial reporting.

sources.title: Beyond Meat BYND Stock Jumps As Delisting Fears Ease
sources.snippet: Nasdaq compliance risk eased after BYND filed delayed 10-K on 2026/04/09; Q4 2025 revenue down ~20%; multiple securities class actions.

sources.title: Beyond Meat Faces Nasdaq Delisting Risk, Eyes Reverse Split
sources.snippet: Company faces Nasdaq delisting risk and is considering a reverse stock split to regain $1 compliance.

sources.title: Is Beyond Meat a Long-Term Buy or a Fad That's Fading?
sources.snippet: Swapping 0% notes for 7% notes to get three extra years before maturity; sales declining across the board.
